<!-- Generated by GitHub Copilot -->
# Deployment Guide

## Local Frontend Run

1. Install root dependencies: `npm ci`
2. Start shell only: `npm start`
3. Start all micro-apps: `npm run start:all`

## Local Backend Run

1. Install backend dependencies: `npm --prefix backend ci`
2. Copy `backend/.env.example` to `backend/.env`
3. Start backend API: `npm --prefix backend run dev`

## Containerized Backend (Podman or Docker)

1. Use the runbook in `docs/BACKEND-PODMAN-SETUP.md`
2. Validate backend health at `http://localhost:5000/api/health`
3. Validate shell at `http://localhost:4200`

## CI Pipeline

`.github/workflows/ci.yml` runs on push/PR and performs:

1. `npx nx affected --target=lint`
2. `npm test`
3. `npx nx affected --target=build`
4. `npm audit --omit=dev --audit-level=high` (non-blocking)

## Release Pipeline

`.github/workflows/release.yml` runs on semantic version tags (`v*.*.*`) and performs:

1. Lint all projects
2. Run tests
3. Build all projects with production configuration
4. Run non-blocking production-focused dependency audit
5. Upload `dist/apps/**` artifacts

## Production Deployment

`.github/workflows/deploy.yml` deploys shell and remotes to Azure Static Web Apps from `main`.

Required GitHub secrets:

1. `AZURE_SWA_SHELL_TOKEN`
2. `AZURE_SWA_RISK_TOKEN`
3. `AZURE_SWA_COMPLIANCE_TOKEN`
4. `AZURE_SWA_AUDIT_TOKEN`
5. `AZURE_SWA_POLICY_TOKEN`
6. `AZURE_SWA_INCIDENT_TOKEN`
7. `AZURE_SWA_VENDOR_TOKEN`
8. `AZURE_SWA_ONBOARDING_TOKEN`
9. `NX_CLOUD_ACCESS_TOKEN` (for Nx Cloud optimizations)

## Environment Baseline

Root `.env.example` controls frontend runtime and remote URLs.

Backend `.env.example` controls:

1. `DATABASE_URL`
2. `CORS_ORIGIN`
3. `AUTO_SEED` and `AUTO_SEED_PRESET`
4. realtime simulator settings (`ENABLE_REALTIME_SIMULATOR`, `REALTIME_TICK_MS`)
5. bulk-load controls (`MAX_RECORDS_PER_DOMAIN`, `BULK_LOAD_PRESET`, `BULK_LOAD_SEED`)
